steps.title: Fit the function from the table
steps.content: Enter the table points $(1,5)$, $(3,13)$, and $(5,21)$ and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read the model
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=4$ and $b=1$, so $f(x)=4x+1$. This checks all three rows: $4(1)+1=5$, $4(3)+1=13$, and $4(5)+1=21$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is $f(x)=4x+1$, so C is correct.
